description: Full project coding workflow — implement features, fix bugs, write tests

phases.name: discover
phases.instruction: Before touching any code: 1) Read the relevant files completely. 2) Check git status and recent commits. 3) Understand existing conventions (typing, dataclasses, patterns). 4) Search memory for similar past tasks.

phases.name: plan
phases.instruction: Plan the implementation: 1) List specific files to create/modify. 2) Identify dependencies. 3) Consider edge cases. 4) For complex tasks, dispatch to specialized agents.

phases.name: implement
phases.instruction: Write clean, minimal code following project conventions. Add error handling. Don't add comments unless they explain non-obvious behavior.

phases.name: test
phases.instruction: Run existing tests. Add new tests if the feature has testable behavior. Verify the code works end-to-end.

phases.name: verify
phases.instruction: Run the full test suite. Check for regressions. Verify the goal is actually achieved.

success_criteria: Code compiles, tests pass, implementation matches the goal, and existing tests aren't broken.
escalation_triggers: A dependency is missing and cannot be installed
The approach requires architectural changes beyond the task scope
The task requires specialized knowledge (security, performance, etc.)
